sentence: The ___ can repeat everything you say.
sentenceKorean: 앵무새는 당신이 하는 말을 모두 따라 해요.

sentence: The blue ___ is the largest animal on Earth.
Many exotic animals live in the ___.
The ___ is one of the fastest birds in the world.
sentenceKorean: 매는 세계에서 가장 빠른 새 중 하나예요.

sentence: The ___ walked slowly across the beach.
A ___ can survive for months without water.
sentenceKorean: 선인장은 물 없이 몇 달을 버틸 수 있어요.

sentence: The ___ soared high above the mountains.
Thousands of fish live near the ___ reef.
sentenceKorean: 수천 마리의 물고기가 산호초 근처에 살아요.

sentence: The ___ is known for its spotted fur.
A ___ is very intelligent and friendly.
Giant pandas eat ___ all day long.
sentenceKorean: 자이언트 판다는 하루 종일 대나무를 먹어요.
